parameters.query:
SELECT 
  psc.id as config_id,
  psc.page_id,
  psc.current_file_index,
  psc.captions,
  p.facebook_page_id,
  p.access_token_webhook as access_token,
  p.name as page_name,
  -- Find the slot index matching NOW
  (
    SELECT i - 1
    FROM generate_series(1, array_length(psc.post_times, 1)) i
    WHERE DATE_TRUNC('minute', psc.post_times[i]::TIME) = DATE_TRUNC('minute', CURRENT_TIME::TIME)
    LIMIT 1
  ) as time_index,
  psc.subfolder_ids,
  psc.subfolder_names,
  psc.last_posted_times
FROM post_schedule_config psc
JOIN pages p ON p.id = psc.page_id
WHERE psc.is_active = true
  AND p.is_active = true
  AND DATE_TRUNC('minute', CURRENT_TIME::TIME) = ANY(
    ARRAY(SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', t) FROM UNNEST(psc.post_times) AS t)
  )
  -- Per-slot deduplication: only block if THIS SPECIFIC SLOT already posted today
  AND (
    psc.last_posted_times IS NULL
    OR array_length(psc.last_posted_times, 1) IS NULL
    OR psc.last_posted_times[(
        SELECT i
        FROM generate_series(1, array_length(psc.post_times, 1)) i
        WHERE DATE_TRUNC('minute', psc.post_times[i]::TIME) = DATE_TRUNC('minute', CURRENT_TIME::TIME)
        LIMIT 1
      )] IS NULL
    OR DATE(psc.last_posted_times[(
        SELECT i
        FROM generate_series(1, array_length(psc.post_times, 1)) i
        WHERE DATE_TRUNC('minute', psc.post_times[i]::TIME) = DATE_TRUNC('minute', CURRENT_TIME::TIME)
        LIMIT 1
      )]) < CURRENT_DATE
  );

INSERT INTO posted_files (
  page_id, 
  google_drive_file_id, 
  file_name, 
  file_type,
  facebook_post_id,
  status,
  posted_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Image_Or_Video').item.json.page_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Image_Or_Video').item.json.file_id }}',
  '{{ $('Image_Or_Video').item.json.file_name }}',
  '{{ $('Image_Or_Video').item.json.file_type }}',
  '{{ $json.id ?? $json.post_id ?? "" }}',
  'success',
  NOW()
);

UPDATE post_schedule_config
SET
  last_posted_at = NOW(),
  current_file_index = {{ $('Image_Or_Video').item.json.next_index }},
  -- Update only the slot that just posted; leave other slots untouched.
  -- Uses a subquery to rebuild the array with NOW() at position (time_index + 1).
  last_posted_times = (
    SELECT ARRAY(
      SELECT CASE 
        WHEN i = {{ $('Image_Or_Video').item.json.time_index }} + 1
        THEN NOW()
        ELSE COALESCE(last_posted_times[i], NULL)
      END
      FROM generate_series(
        1,
        GREATEST(
          COALESCE(array_length(post_times, 1), 1),
          {{ $('Image_Or_Video').item.json.time_index }} + 1
        )
      ) i
    )
  )
WHERE id = '{{ $('Image_Or_Video').item.json.config_id }}'::uuid;
